reviews.author: Nvk
reviews.review_body:
RUDE STAFF ….!!!! Just called the school to inquire about admission ….
Me: May I know who I am speaking with ???
The rude man  :” Why”?
Me : I am asking you name because you told me to call later , and you clearly stated you are incharge . I would like to speak to you when I call next .
The rude Man again said : “YOU DON’T NEED TO KNOW” (With a discourteous tone )
I must say such repulsive attitude was a little shocking ..  IF THEY CANT TEACH STAFF MANNERS THEY ARE DEFINITELY NOT WORTH IT !!!
Who wants their kids around such rude people ?
What Will a child do with a certificate from this school , if it comes with trauma of being around uncivilized people 6-7 hours a day?

reviews.author: tanya uppal
reviews.review_body:
So i got a call after i had put my resume . They called me and very sweetly everything was done . The incharge and principal were respectful. They just told me to work for a week in a class who had no teacher  and then they shall put me somewhere. I am b.ed and have 10 years of experience in reputed schools. After a week when there work was done tgey are giving me this reason that u have not sone your qualifications from a regular college which i told them before only because i was working.
They could have seen this before making me join and wasting my time .
I was fooled .
The teachers were authoritative to not let me show my skills in the class .
I told them clearly of not giving me opportunity.
Very sad to see such schools behaving this way with faculty and even with children .
I am still working with a reputed school .
But had a very worst experience of my work life .

reviews.author: Sheikh Waseem
reviews.review_body:
Nestled in the heart of New Delhi, Vasant Valley School stands as a beacon of academic excellence and holistic development. Having had the privilege of being associated with this esteemed institution, I can confidently assert that Vasant Valley is more than just a school; it's an educational sanctuary that fosters growth, curiosity, and character.

The academic prowess of Vasant Valley is commendable. The curriculum seamlessly blends traditional knowledge with modern methodologies, ensuring that students not only grasp subjects thoroughly but also develop critical thinking skills. The dedicated faculty, a mix of experienced educators and dynamic young minds, create a vibrant learning environment where every question is encouraged, and every idea is valued.

Beyond the classrooms, Vasant Valley excels in providing a rich tapestry of extracurricular activities. From arts and sports to cultural pursuits, students are given ample opportunities to explore their interests and hone their talents. The school's emphasis on holistic development is evident in its well-equipped sports facilities, art studios, and a myriad of clubs catering to diverse passions.

Vasant Valley's commitment to character development is a defining feature. The values of integrity, compassion, and social responsibility are woven into the fabric of daily life. The school's community service initiatives not only contribute to the betterment of society but also instill a sense of empathy and civic duty in the students.

The state-of-the-art facilities, from well-designed classrooms to advanced laboratories and a resource-rich library, reflect the school's dedication to providing a conducive learning environment. With a strong emphasis on parental involvement and communication, Vasant Valley ensures that the partnership between the school and parents is an integral part of a student's educational journey.

In conclusion, Vasant Valley School in New Delhi is more than an educational institution; it's a nurturing ground for future leaders, critical thinkers, and compassionate individuals. My association with Vasant Valley has been a journey of academic excellence, personal growth, and lifelong friendships. Choosing Vasant Valley is not just choosing a school; it's choosing a foundation for a bright and promising future.
